description_long: This object is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base, featuring a combination of dark and light stone materials. The headstone consists of two upright, asymmetrical black stone slabs, one taller than the other, with a minimalist cross cutout in the taller slab. The grave cover is composed of two large, flat, light gray stone panels separated by a narrow gap, resting on a slightly raised platform. The entire structure sits on a larger, flat, light-colored stone foundation that extends beyond the grave's perimeter. The design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a strong contrast between the dark headstone and the lighter grave cover. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative elements aside from the cross motif.
description: A modern grave monument with a dual black stone headstone featuring a cross cutout, set atop a light gray stone grave cover and base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two upright black stone slabs, one with a cross cutout, and the light gray grave cover behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the grave cover and the layered stone platform beneath the headstone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the grave cover and the split between the two panels, with the headstone in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone slabs and the layered grave cover structure.
